title: poa maniototo
intro: Poa maniototo, also known as mountain grass or New Zealand mountain grass, is a species of grass native to New Zealand and other parts of the world. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Herbal preparations of Poa maniototo can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
